commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a full-local Agent OS alpha substrate with Docker sidecars, Blackboard/proof contracts, capability-agent scripts, an NVIDIA Sentinel proxy, package entries, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +962, Tests +5200, Docs +327, Config +17, Other +9307. Total +15813 across 28 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the schema/status mismatch, plaintext vault write, Docker host-publish change, and per-agent skills overwrite paths. I did not run the Docker stack because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer needs to decide the Agent OS scope plus credential, Docker exposure, and upgrade boundaries before automation can safely reshape this broad PR.
